# Must Read: The Strange Triumph of North Korea

**From:** Foreign Affairs <news@foreignaffairs.com>
**Date:** Tue, 28 Apr 2026 06:04:38 -0400 (EDT)
**Source:** [View original](https://link.foreignaffairs.com/view/64456883d447307be60958dcr15xm.an1j/131c0225)

---

96
Why the next global crisis could start with the hermit kingdom.

Subscribe

Subscribe

April 28, 2026 | View in Browser

While the world’s attention has been commanded by the war in Iran, a rupturing transatlantic alliance, and the forward march of artificial intelligence, a trio of articles in our latest issue considers a consequential place that has been conspicuously absent from the headlines: North Korea. In the past five years, the secretive authoritarian state has experienced a remarkable geopolitical reversal of fortune. [Jung H. Pak explains](https://link.foreignaffairs.com/click/45403978.496423/aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm9yZWlnbmFmZmFpcnMuY29tL25vcnRoLWtvcmVhL2hvdy1ub3J0aC1rb3JlYS13b24tanVuZy1wYWs_cz1FU1BaWjAwNkE2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09cHJvbW9fZW1haWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wb3N0JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1QUk9NX01KMjYlMjBQb3N0JTIwUmVsZWFzZSUyMDFfMDQyODI2X1RoZSUyMFN0cmFuZ2UlMjBUcml1bXBoJTIwb2YlMjBOb3J0aCUyMEtvcmVhJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjYwNDI4JnV0bV90ZXJtPU4mdXRtX2lkPUI/64456883d447307be60958dcBcfd32c4a) how North Korean leader Kim Jong Un transformed himself from a global pariah into a global power player. [Oriana Skylar Mastro warns](https://link.foreignaffairs.com/click/45403978.) that the growing relationship between Moscow and Pyongyang is making the Korean Peninsula a more dangerous place. And [Victor Cha makes the case](https://link.foreignaffairs.com/click/45403978.496423/aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm9yZWlnbmFmZmFpcnMuY29tL25vcnRoLWtvcmVhL25vcnRoLWtvcmVhLWl0LXZpY3Rvci1jaGE_cz1FU1BaWjAwNkE2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09cHJvbW9fZW1haWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wb3N0JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1QUk9NX01KMjYlMjBQb3N0JTIwUmVsZWFzZSUyMDFfMDQyODI2X1RoZSUyMFN0cmFuZ2UlMjBUcml1bXBoJTIwb2YlMjBOb3J0aCUyMEtvcmVhJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjYwNDI4JnV0bV90ZXJtPU4mdXRtX2lkPUI/64456883d447307be60958dcBdce4124a) for a U.S. strategy to manage the new North Korean threat. Together, they show how North Korea could play a major role in the next global crisis. Start reading below.

You are reading a selection of articles from the current May/June issue.
To receive the full issue, [subscribe here](https://link.foreignaffairs.com/click/45403978.).

[How North Korea Won](https://link.foreignaffairs.com/click/45403978.496423/aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm9yZWlnbmFmZmFpcnMuY29tL25vcnRoLWtvcmVhL2hvdy1ub3J0aC1rb3JlYS13b24tanVuZy1wYWs_cz1FU1BaWjAwNkE2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09cHJvbW9fZW1haWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wb3N0JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1QUk9NX01KMjYlMjBQb3N0JTIwUmVsZWFzZSUyMDFfMDQyODI2X1RoZSUyMFN0cmFuZ2UlMjBUcml1bXBoJTIwb2YlMjBOb3J0aCUyMEtvcmVhJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjYwNDI4JnV0bV90ZXJtPU4mdXRtX2lkPUI/64456883d447307be60958dcDcfd32c4a)
